generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. A youthful anthropomorphic leopard cat kneeling by a forest river, looking in surprise at a small fish that pops its head out of the golden cup the cat is holding. Soft, pastel magical atmosphere. High-fidelity Taiwan leopard cat features (forehead stripes, ear spots). Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The Page of Cups is 'The Young Investigator'—a juvenile leopard cat learning the secrets of the forest waters.

meanings.upright: Curiosity, a messenger of emotions, creative beginnings, and intuitive dreams.
meanings.reversed: Immaturity, escaping reality, emotional vulnerability, or a creative block.

ecology.mapping_note: Page of Cups represents 'The Explorer'—the juvenile phase of learning how to navigate the complex world before leaving the maternal range.

website.excerpt: A surprise from the golden cup speaks of secret messages hidden within the forest waters.
website.seo_description: Page of Cups reimagined as a curious juvenile leopard cat discovering the secrets of the water.
